metric_definitions.raw_population_vote_value_index: mean census usual-resident population across declared wards divided by ward census usual-resident population; national ward-level metric, no council normalisation
metric_definitions.raw_councillor_per_resident_index: (incumbent councillors in ward / ward population) divided by national councillors-per-resident across declared wards with councillor count > 0; no council normalisation
metric_definitions.raw_electorate_vote_value_index: mean current electorate across declared wards with current_total_electorate divided by ward current_total_electorate; no council normalisation
